main_claims.claim: Schema/client-compatible changes can be agent-facing breaking.
evidence: C4b case study: unchanged schema/call signature, no visible policy error, hidden violation, reward 1.0 to 0.0
static checker misses C1-C4 schema-invisible semantic drift
main_claims.sufficiency: sufficient if framed as controlled-suite mechanism evidence, not production base rate

main_claims.claim: Observability improves recoverability over silent semantic drift.

evidence: exposed airline C4b DeepSeek: 0/17 success with 17/17 oracle and hidden violations
unused-tool negative control: 5/6 success, 0/6 oracle/visible/hidden violations
airline audit rules out timeout, max-step cutoff, and target-not-called confounds
exposure-aware protocol and predictor feature-family analysis
main_claims.sufficiency: sufficient as mechanism and protocol claim, not standalone predictor claim

main_claims.claim: Schema-only checking is insufficient; AFC-Gate is useful as a screening prototype.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Worst-case framing, C4a counterpart, unused-tool negative control, airline replication, five-level observability gradient, audit checks, changelog grounding.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Keep claims mechanistic and avoid production-frequency implication.

reviewer_attack_surface.attack: Only C-class data; where are B/D mutations?
reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Taxonomy covers A/B/C/D; B/D limitations are explicit; main evidence targets semantic observability.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Defer B/D or run only a small appendix pilot if time remains.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Threats/RQ5 acknowledge this; hard negatives reduce pilot confound.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Keep predictor as explanatory, not deployment-ready.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Retail plus airline formal gradients; external-validity threat is explicit.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Defer third domain to future work.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Four formal models across DeepSeek and DashScope; model-selection threat is explicit.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Use GPT only as optional appendix robustness if complete and clean.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Partial provider rows are excluded unless complete formal packets exist.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Apply GPT decision tree; never overwrite main 1815-cell denominator.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Runtime metadata and runner path are recorded, but exact standalone prompts are not archived.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Archive exact agent prompt, user-simulator prompt, and system messages before submission.

reviewer_attack_surface.attack: RQ2 table still weak / n/a paired denominators
reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Table labels retail rows as aggregate evidence; main empirical burden is RQ3 gradient.
reviewer_attack_surface.recommended_action: Frame RQ2 as evidence slice or move weak rows to appendix.

reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Phase 6C defers compression; no evidence issue.

reviewer_attack_surface.attack: AFCGate evaluated with synthetic/replay evidence, not production deployment
reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Paper frames AFC-Gate as cached-replay screening prototype using deterministic semantic-oracle evidence.

reviewer_attack_surface.attack: 33.8% may be mistaken as real-world base rate
reviewer_attack_surface.current_defense: Threats say controlled mechanism evidence, not production frequency.

Make RQ2 secondary while paired denominators remain n/a.
Ensure 33.8% is clearly a controlled-suite rate, not a production base rate.
Keep artifact manifest links and paths visible and consistent.
Update stale wording that says exact TAU-BENCH commit still needs recording.

more_formal_tests.why: bootstrap CIs are already enough for main observability claim

Add appendix table or one robustness sentence.

case_b_complete_nonmonotone_or_weaker: Do not weaken main claim unless O0 versus observable gap reverses entirely.

Move old predictor pilot table to appendix.
Compress or move case-study trajectory table.
